name: Vermicelli Mix
steps: Soak mushrooms overnight in cold water. Drain dry and cut into long julienne strips.
Place butter and soy into the saucepan.
Cook on low fire until butter is melted.
Soak vermicelli overnight, after draining, keep it dry.
Mix vermicelli mix on a daily basis depending on how much is being sold.
To make mix, mix all together. Service portion is 60 gr.
To finish dish, use girolles cooked in emulsion, truffle oil, lemon juice, and black pepper.
